_meta._doc: Exclusions for InternalShimCallSitesTest. Each entry is a $this->method( call site that the detector flags but is intentional / pre-existing — either authored by a trusted O3-Shop identity (Daniel) post-baseline, or never had the $this->_method( underscore form in the 2022 baseline. The gate test subtracts these from the detector's raw output. See openspec/changes/fix-internal-shim-call-sites/.
